name: API-Football v3
description: API-Football provides football (soccer) data from 900+ leagues and cups. Get information on fixtures, standings, players, coaches, transfers, injuries, predictions, odds, and more. Coverage includes real-time scores, pre-match and in-play odds, team and player statistics.
